subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: All religions are written symbolically. This is the only way in which Truth can be written to withstand time and its changes. Languages change, the meaning of words is lost
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @symbolism, @outward and inward meanings, @limits of language
